name: Katari Atob (Rahman) Loose is a premium Bangladeshi atob rice selected for everyday family cooking and bulk food service use. This 50KG loose sack contains medium-grain rice with a clean natural aroma, bright color, and consistent grain quality for regular meals. When washed and cooked properly, the rice gives soft fluffy texture, balanced moisture, and pleasant taste suitable for plain rice, bhat, khichuri, and traditional home recipes. Packed from trusted local sourcing under S.M Enterprise (Pahartali), it is a practical value choice for households, restaurants, and small catering operations that need dependable quality and stable cooking results.
